metadata.title: Amani Limousines — Premium Private Chauffeur Service in Paris
metadata.description: Luxury private chauffeur service in Paris. Airport transfers CDG, Orly, Le Bourget. Sedans, VIP vans, convoys. Available 24/7.

hero.tag: Premium private chauffeur service in Paris
hero.subtitle: Airport transfers, hourly hire, official delegations. Over 300 premium vehicles. Multilingual chauffeurs. Available 24/7.

disposition.title: Hourly hire
disposition.subtitle: Mise à disposition
disposition.desc: Your private chauffeur in Paris stays at your disposal for however long you need. Half-day, full day, multi-day — the vehicle and chauffeur adapt to your schedule in real time.

transfer.title: Private transfer
transfer.subtitle: Transfert privé
transfer.desc: Door-to-door transfer between any two addresses. Airports, train stations, hotels, meeting venues. The price is fixed in advance — no meter, no surprises.

meetgreet.title: Meet and Greet
meetgreet.subtitle: VIP welcome
meetgreet.desc: Personalised welcome at the arrivals area with a name board. Luggage assistance, escort to the vehicle. Fast Track option available at CDG and Orly.

convoy.title: Vehicle convoy
convoy.subtitle: Convoi de véhicules
convoy.desc: Coordination of multiple vehicles for delegations, diplomatic missions and large-scale events. Centralised dispatch, radio communication between drivers.

security.title: Close protection
security.subtitle: Sécurité rapprochée
security.desc: Secure transport with escort for public figures, diplomats and executives. Lead vehicles, follow cars, drivers trained in defensive driving.

excursion.title: Private excursion
excursion.subtitle: Excursion privée
excursion.desc: Versailles, Champagne, Normandy, Loire Valley, Giverny. Your chauffeur knows the routes and can arrange custom stops along the way. Culinary guide available.

longdistance.title: Long distance
longdistance.subtitle: Longue distance
longdistance.desc: Paris–Deauville, Paris–Brussels, Paris–Lyon, Paris–Côte d'Azur. Our sedans and VIP vans are fitted for long journeys: Wi-Fi, power outlets, workspace.

cta.title: Contact
cta.subtitle: Available 24/7 for bookings, custom quotes and delegation requests. Guaranteed response within 30 minutes.

footer.copyright: © 2026 AMANI LIMOUSINES — PREMIUM PRIVATE CHAUFFEUR SERVICE IN PARIS
